stemHtml: From the screen height of 50 ft, a single-engined piston aeroplane performs a straight-out climb in visual meteorological conditions with a climb gradient of 9%, a TAS of 60 kt experiencing a headwind component of 10 kt. What will be the expected height clearance of a group of trees that are 8 m tall and located at a distance of 250 m on the extended runway centre line from reference zero?
